scripts.format: prettier --write 'src/**/*.{astro,ts,js,css,md}' 'scripts/**/*.mjs' astro.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .pages.yml .github/workflows/{deploy,broken-links,prettier}.yml README.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check 'src/**/*.{astro,ts,js,css,md}' 'scripts/**/*.mjs' astro.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .pages.yml .github/workflows/{deploy,broken-links,prettier}.yml README.md
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler@latest deploy
